title: Strategy team skill profiles
description: The strategy-team tournament uses distinct advisory skill profiles for Momentum, Mean Reversion, and Volatility Breakout while preserving the shared LLM, verifier, compiler, and demo execution path.

soft.momentum_no_late_chase: Momentum chi uu tien trend continuation sau impulse co liquidity va spread sach; khong chase candle da qua xa.
soft.mean_reversion_range_only: Mean Reversion chi fade stretched move khi co range/regime phu hop; khong fade strong trend.
soft.volatility_breakout_pullback: Volatility Breakout uu tien range expansion kem retest/pullback; khong chase breakout qua tre hoac spread rong.

momentum.entry_style: Wait for a confirmed 1H/15m pullback or EMA20 reclaim inside a 4H trend; do not chase beyond 0.5 ATR.
momentum.risk_personality: medium-high conviction trend follower; reduce confidence when entry is far from retest.
momentum.llm_guidance: Momentum may promote trend continuation only when liquidity, spread, and regime support the impulse. Prefer HOLD over chasing an extended move.

mean_reversion.entry_style: Fade a stretched RSI/Bollinger move only in a confirmed 1H range after 15m turns back toward value.
mean_reversion.risk_personality: patient contrarian; low target risk unless range quality is clear.
mean_reversion.llm_guidance: Mean Reversion must not fade strong trends by default. It should return HOLD unless range behavior and invalidation are clear.

volatility_breakout.entry_style: Trade range expansion only after directional pressure is visible, preferring retest or pullback over raw chase.
volatility_breakout.risk_personality: highest tournament risk target, but only for confirmed expansion with clear invalidation.
volatility_breakout.llm_guidance: Volatility Breakout may promote expansion setups, but must prefer pullback entries and reject failed or overextended breakouts.

llm_guidance: Use the strategy_skill_profiles metadata to interpret team-tagged SignalCandidate records. Skill profiles are advisory context only and never bypass hard rules, retrieved playbooks, verifier checks, or the risk compiler. For OPEN_LONG or OPEN_SHORT tickets from a team profile, return profile_compliance_score, profile_compliance_summary, and profile_compliance_flags; use HOLD when the selected setup cannot honestly meet the profile.
